title: callicarpa woodii
intro: Callicarpa woodii is a plant species known as the Purple Passion Flower, which belongs to the Lamiaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Callicarpa woodii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and wounds. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
